title: Warfield Theater - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 (w
content: Went to see a gif here while visiting SF. Gig was great but the drinks are expensive and the theatre felt poorly managed.

title: THE WARFIELD - San Francisco - Yelp
content: Entry and security check was quick and easy. Lovely building and intimate setting for a concert. Seats are a bit tight, as older places are

title: An awful experience. Avoid the Warfield! - Tripadvisor
content: There were no seats available and everywhere. It was a HORRIBLE experience. Seats were comfy and security was good.

title: Warfield Theatre - Wikipedia
content: # Warfield Theatre. Please help improve this article by adding citations to reliable sources. *Find sources:* "Warfield Theatre" – news **·** newspapers **·** books **·** scholar **·** JSTOR *(August 2023)* *(Learn how and when to remove this message)* |. | Warfield Theatre in October 2008 | |. The **Warfield Theatre**, colloquially called **The Warfield**, is a 2,454 capacity event venue located in the Theatre District in downtown San Francisco, California, United States. It was built as a vaudeville theater and opened as the *Loews Warfield* on May 13, 1922. New life came to the Warfield in 1979 when Bob Dylan played 14 shows at the start of his first Gospel Tour in November 1979, and again 12 shows in November 1980 during his "A Musical Retrospective Tour". The shows were a celebration of the band's 15th anniversary and done as a show of appreciation for their loyal fans. Please help improve this section by adding citations to reliable sources.
